prompt: Find the authoritative school board for Juniper County, then fetch its primary 2026 meeting minutes and identify the campuses approved for the summer meal program. List approved campus names alphabetically; omit sites mentioned only in staff discussion.

results.title: Official site — Juniper County School Board

search_2.query: site:juniper-schools.fixture 2026 board minutes summer meal program approved campuses

fetch_1.title: Board Minutes — 21 April 2026
fetch_1.content: The board approved summer meal sites at Harbor Middle, Cedar Elementary, and Westfield Academy. Staff also discussed North Annex, but it was not included in the motion.
